name: Mulligatawny
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Boiling potatoes, peeled and diced
1 lb Chicken breast halves without bones
recipeInstructions:
Combine oil, celery, onions, and garlic in a large pot. Cook over medium heat until fragrant, about 3-4 minutes. Stir in remaining stock, water, boiling potatoes, curry powder, chili powder, ground allspice, thyme, black pepper, chicken wings, and chicken breasts. Simmer for 20-25 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through.
Remove chicken from pot using a slotted spoon. Discard chicken wings. Using a measuring cup, scoop about 2 cups of vegetables and liquid into a separate bowl. When the chicken breasts are cool enough to handle, remove the meat from the bones and chop it finely. Return the chopped meat to the soup and stir well.
Season with salt to taste. The soup will keep in the refrigerator for up to 3 days.
